features: Size / Customization: 180 x 280 cm, we provide professional carpet customization services to perfectly display your creativity and personality. You can choose the size and pattern of the carpet according to your preferences to create a unique and exclusive carpet.

High-quality materials, comfortable and durable: This carpet is made of high-quality fiber materials, soft and comfortable, making your footsteps seem to walk in the clouds. It has good wear resistance and compression resistance, and can maintain good shape and texture even after long-term use and trampling. At the same time, the material is environmentally friendly and non-toxic, providing protection for the health of you and your family.

Anti-slip design, safe and reliable: The back of the carpet is treated with a special anti-slip treatment, which can fit the ground closely and effectively prevent sliding. Whether on a smooth floor or on a slightly sloped place, it can ensure your walking safety. This design is especially important for families with elderly people and children.

Easy to clean, worry-free and labor-saving: Cleaning carpets is no longer a hassle. Our carpets have good stain resistance, and daily dust and stains can be easily cleaned. If necessary, you can choose to vacuum with a vacuum cleaner or wipe it gently with a damp cloth to restore the carpet to a clean and tidy state. Even if you encounter stubborn stains, you can also perform local cleaning, which is convenient and quick.

High-quality after-sales, worry-free shopping: We are committed to providing customers with a high-quality shopping experience. Buy our carpets and you will enjoy perfect after-sales service. If any quality problems occur during use, we will solve them for you in time, so that you have no worries. At the same time, we also provide professional consulting services to help you choose the most suitable carpet.
